title: GroundCheckResponse
description: GroundCheck API response schema v1.0.0. Encapsulates the LLM answer, two-signal confidence scoring (NLI grounding + token-probability generation confidence), citation traceability, processing metadata, and error information. Tier thresholds match confidence/config.py: HIGH>=70, MEDIUM>=40, LOW<40.

query_id.description: Unique identifier for this query. Format: q_YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS_<6-char hex>. Used for logging, audit trail, and client-side deduplication.

query.description: The original user query string, reproduced verbatim.

answer.description: The LLM-generated answer to the query. Null when no answer could be produced (status=error).

citations.description: Ordered list of source document chunks supporting the answer. Empty array when no documents were retrieved.

error.description: Present only when status is 'error' or 'partial_success'. Omitted on full success.

status.description: 'success': both signals available. 'partial_success': answer generated but one signal failed (degraded confidence). 'error': no answer produced.

ConfidenceData.description: Fused confidence result. Combines grounding_score (NLI document support, weight 0.70) and generation_confidence (mean token probability, weight 0.30) into final_score using confidence/fusion.py.

final_score.description: Fused confidence score 0–100. Formula: round((grounding*0.7 + gen_conf*0.3) * 100). Falls back to single signal in degraded mode.

tier.description: Tier derived from final_score using thresholds in confidence/config.py. HIGH>=70, MEDIUM>=40, LOW<40.

weights.description: Weights applied during fusion. Present when at least one signal is available. Default: grounding=0.7, generation=0.3. Adjusted to 1.0/0.0 in degraded mode.

explanation.description: Human-readable explanation of the confidence score, which signals were used, and any degradation.

warnings.description: Non-fatal issues during confidence computation. Present only when status=partial_success.

degraded.description: True when one or both signals were unavailable. Mirrors FusionResult.degraded from confidence/fusion.py.

ConfidenceSignals.description: The two raw confidence signals before fusion.

grounding_score.description: Float 0–1. NLI entailment score from DeBERTa-v3-small measuring how well the answer is supported by retrieved chunks. Formula: mean(max_j(entailment(claim_i, chunk_j))). Null if grounding scorer failed.

generation_confidence.description: Float 0–1. Normalized mean token log-probability from the LLM. Formula: clip((raw_mean - 0.3) / 0.6, 0, 1). Null when logprobs are unavailable.

FusionWeights.description: Weights applied to each signal during fusion. Always sum to 1.0. From confidence/config.py: WEIGHT_GROUNDING=0.70, WEIGHT_GEN_CONF=0.30.

grounding.description: Weight applied to grounding_score. Default 0.7. Set to 1.0 when generation_confidence is unavailable.

generation.description: Weight applied to generation_confidence. Default 0.3. Set to 0.0 when generation_confidence is unavailable.

CitationModel.description: A single retrieved document chunk supporting the answer. Built from retrieval.Citation.to_dict() enriched with NLI entailment scores from grounding_scorer.claim_details.

citation_id.description: Stable ID built from source filename + chunk_index. Format: <source_slug>__chunk_<N>.

page.description: 1-indexed page number within the source document. Null for non-paginated documents.

section.description: Section heading within the document. Null if not available.

similarity_score.description: Cosine similarity between query embedding and chunk embedding (0–1). Converted from ChromaDB cosine distance: similarity = 1 - distance.

entailment_score.description: NLI entailment probability (0–1) from DeBERTa grounding scorer. Best entailment score across all claims for this chunk. Null if grounding scorer was not run.

text_excerpt.description: Chunk text preview truncated to ~300 characters for UI display.

ResponseMetadata.description: Processing metadata for observability, debugging, and audit trail.

model.description: LLM identifier used for answer generation.

nli_model.description: NLI model used for grounding scoring. Null if grounding scorer was not run.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the response was generated.

processing_time_ms.description: Total wall-clock time in milliseconds from request receipt to response serialization.

retrieved_chunks.description: Number of document chunks retrieved from ChromaDB before filtering.

schema_version.description: Version of this response schema for client compatibility checks.

ErrorInfo.description: Structured error payload. Present when status is 'error' or 'partial_success'.

code.description: Machine-readable error code for programmatic client handling.

message.description: Human-readable error message for display or logging.

severity.description: 'warning' = non-fatal, partial result available. 'error' = fatal, no answer produced.

details.description: Technical detail for debugging. Not intended for end-user display.

StoredResult.description: Lightweight result model returned by GET /api/v1/results/{query_id}.
